name: Tootie's Tuna Casserole-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles in salted water and drain.
2. Saute garlic and onion in butter until wilted.
3. Add flour to the sauteed mixture and blend over heat.
4. Gradually add milk while stirring continuously.
5. Cook the sauce until thickened and smooth.
6. Stir in tuna, sherry, salt, and pepper to taste.
7. Optional additions: nuts, sliced olives, cooked peas or beans, quartered artichoke hearts.
8. Transfer the mixture into an 11/2-quart casserole dish.
9. Mix bread crumbs, parsley, and melted butter.
10. Sprinkle the mixture on top of the casserole.
11. Reheat in a 350°F oven for 15 minutes.
